originalTitle: HPE’s stock soars toward record gain as earnings show a networking bonanza
summary: The artificial-intelligence buildout is driving intense demand for networking and servers, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise is reaping the rewards.
content:
The company saw 148% growth in networking revenue for the latest quarter

The artificial-intelligence buildout is driving intense demand for networking and servers, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise is reaping the rewards.

“Customers continue to invest in modernizing their infrastructure and scaling AI, and our performance shows the strength of our combined networking portfolio and the value we are delivering to our shareholders,” HPE CEO Antonio Neri said in a statement.
chineseTitle: 财报显示网络业务繁荣，HPE 股价飙升至创纪录水平
chineseSummary: 人工智能的发展正在推动对网络和服务器的强烈需求，惠普企业正在收获回报。
chineseContent:
该公司最近一个季度的网络收入增长了 148%

人工智能的发展正在推动对网络和服务器的强烈需求，惠普企业正在收获回报。

HPE首席执行官安东尼奥·内里(Antonio Neri)在一份声明中表示：“客户继续投资于基础设施现代化和扩展人工智能，我们的业绩展示了我们组合网络产品组合的实力以及我们为股东提供的价值。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
